query:
SELECT pt.ticker, pt.shares, pt.pricePerShare, pt.currency, pt.fxRate, pt.totalAmount, pt.totalAmountCHF, pt.transactionType
FROM portfolioTransactions pt 
JOIN savedPortfolios p ON pt.portfolioId = p.id 
WHERE p.name = 'Test Dividenden Auto 80k'
ORDER BY pt.ticker;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT pt.ticker, pt.shares, pt.pricePerShare, pt.currency, pt.fxRate, pt.totalAmount, pt.totalAmountCHF, pt.transactionType
FROM portfolioTransactions pt 
JOIN savedPortfolios p ON pt.portfolioId = p.id 
WHERE p.name = 'Test Dividenden Auto 80k'
ORDER BY pt.ticker;
